domain: Ethiopian Ge'ez Orthodox Tewahedo liturgical evaluation (Ethiopia, Saint Yared 6th c.): 3 zema modes Ge'ez (ordinary) + Ezel (Lent/fast) + Araray (principal feasts); 4 zema aspects degwa-chant + zemmare/mawasit-communal/funeral hymn + aquaquam-movement + keddase-liturgical study; qene poetry has dual meaning sem (wax, surface) + worq (gold, hidden); 3-tier debtera education zema → qene → biblical exegesis; sequential mastery ladder, debtera ready only when masters qene.
specific_mechanism: GE'EZ-3-MODE-ZEMA-4-ASPECT-AQUAQUAM-DUAL-MEANING-SEM-WORQ-DEBTERA-TIER-EVALUATION-RUBRIC: LLM evaluation-diagnostic mechanism with (1) 3-mode evaluation R_mode: 3 alternative rubric-modes selected by query-type (ordinary/fast/feast analog → general/edge-case/high-stakes); (2) 4-aspect rubric matrix M_aspect: 4 orthogonal evaluation axes — chant-correctness (notation match) + communal-coherence (consistency) + movement-fluidity (coherence-over-steps) + liturgical-grounding (factuality); (3) dual-meaning sem/worq scoring D_2: 2-layer per-axis — sem (surface-literal) + worq (latent-meaning); both required for full credit; (4) sequential-mastery 3-tier ladder L_3: 3-tier evaluator hierarchy zema-tier basic + qene-tier interpretive + exegesis-tier deep; gated progression; (5) debtera composite weighting w_debt: heuristic from per-tier mastery score with rule 'ready only when masters qene'. Differs from R531 IFA-8-BIT-ODU-256-SIGNATURE-EVAL (8-bit binary signature + 256-verse corpus + palm-nut + babalawo-interpreter 16×16) and R544 AVICENNA-10-PULSE-TYPE-5-PROPERTY-2-STATE (5×2 matrix + 10-pulse + 2-2 oscillation + 4-modal + wrist-probe) by 3-mode zema router + 4-aspect orthogonal axes + dual-meaning sem-worq 2-layer + 3-tier sequential mastery ladder + debtera composite weighting.
llm_application: GE'EZ-3-MODE-ZEMA-4-ASPECT-AQUAQUAM-DUAL-MEANING-SEM-WORQ-DEBTERA-TIER-EVALUATION-RUBRIC LLM mechanism + 3-mode evaluation router geez-ordinary ezel-fast araray-feast + 4-aspect rubric matrix chant-correctness communal-coherence movement-fluidity liturgical-grounding + dual-meaning sem-worq 2-layer scoring + sequential-mastery 3-tier ladder zema-basic qene-interpretive exegesis-deep + debtera composite weighting heuristic. Differs from R531 IFA (closest — 8-bit + 256-verse + babalawo). R544 AVICENNA (closest — 5×2 + 10-pulse + wrist-probe). Differs from LLM-Rubric 2501.00274 + Rubric Is All You Need + LLM-as-Judge + Ragas Rubric by 3-mode rubric router + 4-aspect orthogonal axes + dual-meaning sem-worq + 3-tier sequential mastery + debtera composite. Differs by 3-MODE ZEMA + 4-ASPECT AQUAQUAM + DUAL-MEANING SEM-WORQ + 3-TIER MASTERY LADDER + DEBTERA COMPOSITE.
novelty_claim: LLM-Rubric 2501.00274 + Rubric Is All You Need 2503.23989 + LLM-as-Judge Apr 2026 + Ragas Rubric cover rubric-multidim + LLM-judge paradigm. GE'EZ-3-MODE-ZEMA-4-ASPECT-AQUAQUAM-DUAL-MEANING-SEM-WORQ-DEBTERA-TIER adds (a) 3-mode router + (b) 4-aspect orthogonal axes + (c) dual-meaning sem-worq 2-layer + (d) 3-tier sequential mastery + (e) debtera composite. Recombination — borderline lookup.
